regime_note: INDIA RALLYING: Nifty 24,198 (+1.49%), Sensex +1.60%. Crude crash driving India risk-on. No forex positions. Gold $4,822 drifting. WTI $88.66 (short entry fading — bounce may have peaked). London opens 12:30 IST.

watchlist.thesis: De-escalation = risk-on = yen weak. Setup was wrong. Removed.

watchlist.trigger: Bounce to $89-90 zone (revised down from $91-92 after further dump to $85)
watchlist.entry_plan: Short at ~$89.50 on retest of broken support (was $91-92, lowered after WTI crashed to $85.12)
watchlist.thesis: WTI crashed from $93 to $85.12 on Trump saying Iran ready to deal. De-escalation accelerating. TP lowered to $82 (next support). Don't short at $87.70 — wait for bounce to $89-90.
watchlist.invalidation: If WTI reclaims $91 (former bounce zone), setup is dead.

watchlist.trigger: Break above $76,100 (today's high) — NOT active, momentum fading
watchlist.thesis: BTC was +3% earlier but now fading to +2.16%. Momentum lost. Only enter if fresh breakout above day high. Otherwise skip.
watchlist.invalidation: If BTC drops below $73,000 (today's low), setup is dead.

watchlist.thesis: Dollar weakness building (+0.34%). EUR/USD creeping toward day high. Break above 1.1811 = confirmed dollar sell. Aligns with Gold strength and yen bid.

market_context.session: India OPEN (09:15). F&O expiry. Reliance Q4 after-hours. London opens 12:30 IST.
key_events_upcoming: Apr 15: India market reopens (F&O expiry + Reliance Q4)
market_context.hormuz_status: MAJOR DE-ESCALATION: Trump says Iran contacted Washington, ready to deal. WTI crashed from $89 to $85.12. Round 2 Pakistan talks expected within days. Iran mulling Hormuz shipment pause. Ceasefire holds to Apr 22.
market_context.dominant_theme: De-escalation pricing holds overnight. WTI steady ~$89.6, Gold grinding $4,831 (+1.9%), yen bid intact. Tokyo session — USDJPY near trigger (158.76 vs 158.60 break level). No new catalysts overnight.

trade_history.exit_reason: SL hit (trailing stop at breakeven). De-escalation regime shift killed Gold rally. Peak unrealized +$52.20 at $4,871.
trade_history.lessons: Trailing stop worked as designed. Entry thesis was correct (Gold diverged from crude). Exit was regime-driven, not thesis failure. Would take same trade again.
